title: Bolzano-Weierstrass Property in Metric Spaces
description: A visual explanation of how the Bolzano-Weierstrass property characterizes compactness in metric spaces, showing the equivalence between sequential compactness and the property that every infinite subset has a limit point.
relationships: Sequence (x_n) is constructed from the infinite subset S
Sequence (x_n) has a convergent subsequence because K is compact (sequentially compact)
The limit of this subsequence is the limit point p contained in K
This demonstrates that every infinite subset S of a compact metric space K has a limit point in K (Bolzano-Weierstrass property)
